headline: XRP News: The Truth Behind the XRP and JPMorgan Rumors
summary: Bitcoin price held a razor-thin range between $76,000 and $77,000 on Monday, recording just a -0.05% change at $76,797.74 while the broader crypto market buckled under iran geopolitical pressure. Over $300 million in crypto positions were liquidated in 24 hours, according to data from Coinglass, with long traders absorbing the ...

headline: Chase enters Germany with digital savings account
summary: The new account pays 4% annual interest for the first four months. After that introductory period, a variable standard rate of 2% a year will apply.

content.title: Chase enters Germany with digital savings account
content.summary: The new account pays 4% annual interest for the first four months. After that introductory period, a variable standard rate of 2% a year will apply.

thumbnail.caption: The German business will operate through a mobile-only model. Credit: Diego Thomazini/ Shutterstock.com.

headline: Astera Labs Stock Notches Record High. It’s Up Double Digits for a Second Day.
summary: Shares of  Astera Labs  surged Wednesday, building on a strong gain from Tuesday as investors appeared bullish on the maker of semiconductor-based connectors for cloud and artificial-intelligence infrastructure ahead of  Nvidia  earnings and after the company gave upbeat commentary at a technology and media conference.  Astera Labs stock jumped 18% to $287.48 on Wednesday, marking a record closing high.  At a J.P. Morgan technology, media and communications conference on Tuesday, Astera Labs executives sounded an optimistic note on the company’s Scorpio X fabric switches, networking hardware used by data centers.

content.title: Astera Labs Stock Notches Record High. It’s Up Double Digits for a Second Day.
content.summary: Shares of  Astera Labs  surged Wednesday, building on a strong gain from Tuesday as investors appeared bullish on the maker of semiconductor-based connectors for cloud and artificial-intelligence infrastructure ahead of  Nvidia  earnings and after the company gave upbeat commentary at a technology and media conference.  Astera Labs stock jumped 18% to $287.48 on Wednesday, marking a record closing high.  At a J.P. Morgan technology, media and communications conference on Tuesday, Astera Labs executives sounded an optimistic note on the company’s Scorpio X fabric switches, networking hardware used by data centers.

headline: JPMorgan sees biotech sector at inflection point, resumes coverage on 14 Firms
summary: Investing.com -- JPMorgan has reinstated ratings and price targets on 14 large-cap biotechnology companies, describing the sector as being at a critical “inflection point” as pipeline successes increasingly translate into profitable commercial franchises.

content.title: JPMorgan sees biotech sector at inflection point, resumes coverage on 14 Firms
content.summary: Investing.com -- JPMorgan has reinstated ratings and price targets on 14 large-cap biotechnology companies, describing the sector as being at a critical “inflection point” as pipeline successes increasingly translate into profitable commercial franchises.
